1241.candidate_text:
('keeps arrays', () => {
    const rows = [
      [1, 2, 3],
      [5, 5, 5],
      [5, 1, 2],
      [2, 1, 2],
      [1, 5, 2],
      [2, 2, 1],
      [1, 2, 5],
    ]
    const predicate = (row: number[]): boolean => row.indexOf(5) > -1
    const result = keep<number[]>(rows, predicate)
    expect(result).toEqual([
      [5, 5, 5],
      [5, 1, 2],
      [1, 5, 2],
      [1, 2, 5],
    ])
  })
